basic_details.job_title: BPCL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 250 Junior Executive, Associate Executive & Secretary Posts
basic_details.post_name: Junior Executive (Engineering / Accounts / Wayside Amenities), Secretary BPCL, Associate Executive (Quality Assurance / Official Language Implementation)
basic_details.short_information: The latest Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited (BPCL) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Entry Level Profiles (Junior Executive, Associate Executive & Secretary) posts! Published on the official website https://www.bharatpetroleum.in, this new recruitment drive offers 250 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the 32 to 35 years age group and possessing qualifications like Diploma, Graduation, M.Sc, Masters in Hindi, or Inter CA/CMA can apply online from 18 April 2026 to 24 May 2026. Find all details about the BPCL Entry Level Profiles new vacancy 2026, including eligibility

application_fee.details: Age relaxations as per Presidential Directives for OBC-NCL / SC / ST / PwBD / Ex-Servicemen (cumulative maximum 10 years).

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma, B. Com / BBA / B.Sc / BMS / BHM, M. Sc, Masters in Hindi, Inter CA / Inter CMA + Graduation
qualification.details: Candidates must fulfil the essential educational qualification and minimum work-experience as on 01.04.2026. | Junior Executive (Engineering): | Educational Qualification: Diploma in Engineering (3-year course) in Mechanical / Electrical / Instrumentation / Electronics / Civil / Chemical Engineering from a recognized University with minimum 55% aggregate (relaxed to 50% for SC/ST/PwBD). Work Experience: Minimum 5 years of continuous post-qualification relevant work experience (including minimum 1 year in managerial/supervisory role) in sectors like POL Terminal/Depot, LPG Bottling Plant, Pipeline, Refinery, Petrochemical, etc. | Junior Executive (Accounts) | Educational Qualification: Graduate in any discipline with minimum 55% + Inter CA / Inter CMA. Work Experience: Minimum 5 years of post-qualification relevant experience in finance function. | Junior Executive (Wayside Amenities) | Educational Qualification: B.Com / BBA / B.Sc / BMS / BHM with minimum 55% (relaxed to 50% for SC/ST/PwBD). Work Experience: Minimum 5 years of relevant post-qualification experience (at least 3 years in Facility Management / QSR / Retail / Hospitality, etc.). | Secretary | Educational Qualification: Class X + Class XII + Bachelor's Degree (3-year course) with minimum 55% in each (relaxed to 50% for SC/ST/PwBD). Work Experience: Minimum 5 years as Secretarial Assistant / Secretary or similar roles. | Associate Executive (Quality Assurance) | Educational Qualification: M.Sc (Chemistry) with specialization in specified branches with minimum 60% (relaxed to 55% for SC/ST/PwBD). Work Experience: Minimum 3 years post-qualification relevant work experience in laboratory in Petroleum / Oil & Gas / Petro-Chemical / Chemical industry. | Associate Executive (Official Language Implementation) | Educational Qualification: Master’s in Hindi (2-year course) with minimum 55% (relaxed to 50% for SC/ST/PwBD) + English studied in Class XII / Graduation with minimum 55%. Work Experience: Minimum 3 years of post-qualification work experience in translation (English ↔ Hindi). | Common Note for All Profiles | Only Indian Nationals are eligible.

salary_details.details: Candidates will be inducted at the minimum of the pay scale. In addition to Basic Pay, Dearness Allowance (IDA pattern), HRA (if applicable), Perks & Allowances, Retirement Benefits and Performance Related Pay will be payable as per Corporation’s policy.

selection_process: Multi-stage selection process may comprise Application Screening
Personal Interview etc. Provisional selection based on Relevant work-experience
Performance in various selection processes. Final appointment subject to successful completion of Pre-Employment Medical Examination.
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply ONLINE only through the official BPCL website. No other mode of application will be accepted. The online application process is open from 18 April 2026 to 24 May 2026 (23:59 hrs).

Check Eligibility: Ensure that you meet all the eligibility criteria including educational qualification, age limit, and work experience before applying. No eligibility-related queries will be entertained.

Keep Documents Ready: Prepare scanned copies (PDF format) of the following documents: Date of Birth Proof (Class 10th/12th Certificate) Educational Qualification Certificates (Marksheet + Degree/Diploma) Work Experience Certificates (with job role, duration, salary, etc.) Caste/Category Certificate (if applicable) Recent Passport Size Photograph (latest, not older than April 2026) Scanned Signature (not in CAPITAL letters) Last 3 Salary Slips (combined in one PDF)
Date of Birth Proof (Class 10th/12th Certificate)
Educational Qualification Certificates (Marksheet + Degree/Diploma)
Work Experience Certificates (with job role, duration, salary, etc.)
Caste/Category Certificate (if applicable)
Recent Passport Size Photograph (latest, not older than April 2026)
Scanned Signature (not in CAPITAL letters)
Last 3 Salary Slips (combined in one PDF)
Register Online: Visit the BPCL Careers page and click on “Apply Online” Click on “New Registration” Enter Name, Email ID, and Mobile Number Note the Registration Number and Password generated
Visit the BPCL Careers page and click on “Apply Online”
Click on “New Registration”
Enter Name, Email ID, and Mobile Number
Note the Registration Number and Password generated
Fill Application Form: Login using credentials Fill personal, educational, and experience details carefully Use “Save & Next” to verify details
Login using credentials
Fill personal, educational, and experience details carefully
Use “Save & Next” to verify details
Upload Documents: Upload photograph, signature, and required documents as per prescribed format.
Preview Application: Carefully review all details using the Preview Tab before final submission. No changes will be allowed after submission.
Pay Application Fee: Pay via Debit Card / Credit Card / UPI / Net Banking Ensure payment status shows “Completed” Take a printout of payment receipt
Pay via Debit Card / Credit Card / UPI / Net Banking
Ensure payment status shows “Completed”
Take a printout of payment receipt
Final Submission: Click on “Submit” to complete the application process.
Apply only once; multiple applications may lead to rejection.
No hard copy of application needs to be sent to BPCL.
Ensure all details match original documents; mismatch may lead to disqualification.
Keep your registered email ID and mobile number active for future communication.
important_instructions: Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply. The cutoff date for age, qualification, and experience is 01 April 2026. All qualifications must be from AICTE/UGC recognized institutions. Marks should be calculated on total aggregate; no rounding off allowed. CGPA must be converted into percentage as per university norms. Only post-qualification experience will be considered. Internship/training during studies will not be counted. Candidates must fill the application form carefully; details once submitted are final. No changes will be allowed after final submission. Submit only one application; latest application will be considered if multiple are submitted. Candidates working in Govt/PSU must produce NOC during selection. Shortlisting is provisional and subject to document verification. Ineligible candidates at any stage will be disqualified. All communication will be done via registered email only. Selection process participation does not guarantee final selection. Updates/corrigendum will be available only on the official website. Travel Allowance (TA) will be provided as per rules for eligible candidates. BPCL reserves the right to cancel/modify recruitment or change vacancies. Providing false information will lead to disqualification. Canvassing or external influence will result in rejection. Apply only through the official portal; beware of fraudulent agents. Any dispute will be subject to Mumbai jurisdiction.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in BPCL Entry Level Profiles Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited has released an indicative 250 vacancies for various Entry Level Profiles including Junior Executive (Engineering / Accounts / Wayside Amenities), Secretary BPCL and Associate Executive (Quality Assurance / Official Language Implementation), and the exact number may vary depending on organisational requirements.

faq.question: Q2. What are the application dates for BPCL Entry Level Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application process starts on 18 April 2026 and the last date to submit the application form is 24 May 2026 up to 23:59 hours, through the BPCL official careers portal in the “Job Openings” section.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification and experience required for Junior Executive (Engineering)?
faq.answer: For Junior Executive (Engineering), candidates must have a 3‑year Diploma in Engineering in Mechanical / Electrical / Instrumentation / Electronics / Civil / Chemical from a recognised institute with minimum 55% aggregate marks (50% for SC/ST/PwBD), along with at least 5 years of continuous post‑qualification relevant experience (including minimum 1 year in a managerial/supervisory role) in sectors like POL terminals, LPG plants, pipelines, refineries, petrochemicals etc.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility for Junior Executive (Accounts) and Junior Executive (Wayside Amenities)?
faq.answer: Junior Executive (Accounts): Graduate in any discipline with minimum 55% marks plus Inter CA or Inter CMA, and minimum 5 years of relevant post‑qualification experience in finance functions. Junior Executive (Wayside Amenities): B.Com / BBA / B.Sc / BMS / BHM with at least 55% marks (50% for SC/ST/PwBD) and minimum 5 years relevant experience, including at least 3 years in Facility Management / QSR / Retail / Hospitality or similar sectors.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for BPCL Entry Level Profiles 2026?
faq.answer: The upper age limit as on 01 April 2026 is 32 years for Junior Executive (Engineering), Junior Executive (Wayside Amenities) and Secretary BPCL, and 35 years for Junior Executive (Accounts) and Associate Executive (Quality Assurance / Official Language), with age relaxations for OBC‑NCL / SC / ST / PwBD / Ex‑Servicemen as per Presidential Directives (total relaxation capped at 10 years where applicable).

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for BPCL Entry Level Profiles Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: For UR / OBC‑NCL / EWS candidates, the application fee is ₹1,180 (₹1,000 + 18% GST, plus payment gateway charges if any), while SC / ST / PwBD candidates are exempted from payment of the application fee, and must only complete the online form.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for BPCL Entry Level Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: BPCL will follow a multi‑stage selection process which may include application screening, Written / Computer‑Based Test, Case‑based Discussion, Group Task and Personal Interview, and provisional selection will be based on relevant work‑experience, significant on‑the‑job achievements and performance in these stages, with final appointment subject to medical fitness in the Pre‑Employment Medical Examination.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply online for BPCL Entry Level Profiles Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must visit the BPCL official website (bharatpetroleum.in), go to Careers → Job Openings, select the “Entry Level Profiles” advertisement, complete One‑Time Registration, fill the online application form with accurate personal, academic and experience details, upload the required documents, pay the fee (if applicable), and finally submit and download the application form/acknowledgement for future reference; multiple applications should be avoided as only the latest valid application will be considered.
